MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WILLIAMS LEA INCORPORATED'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO WAGE CLAIM BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS DECLARATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO AGE DISCRIMINATION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DID NOT RAISE THE ISSUE IN HER DFEH COMPLAINT AND CANNOT ESTABLISH A PRIMA FACIE CASE. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO DEFAMATION BECAUSE THE ONLY NON-HEARSAY STATEMENTS ARE PRIVILEGED AND GRANTED AS TO RETALIATION. CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGE IS MOOT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
